{{Quote|The planet's name is Quadrant Seven. It's not in the Republic - it doesn't have a Senator and it's not particularly friendly to outlanders, but it doesn't forbid them, either.|[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]|<ref name="SotJ" />}}
'''Quadrant Seven''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which was not part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The planet's last war took place in about [[612 BBY]]. It was a rocky world with canyons, [[Cave/Legends|caves]], and hills.

{{Planet-stub}}
